problem_statement.title: Update to remove whitespace and add padding when necessary
problem_statement.body:
fixes #4348 `actionLink()` is underlining into surrounding whitespace (both after text into the rest of the tag container AND between text and icons). This seems to be because of the `action_label` wrapper changes. We can fix this by ensuring that we don't add white space around the tag and add a little bit of margin in cases where there is an icon. See below for a kitchen sink example of the changes.
Screenshots
Code for Above ``` devtools::load_all(".", export_all = FALSE) library(bslib) ui <- page_fluid( theme = bs_theme(version = 5), h1("Complete Action Elements Test"), p("Testing all variations of actionButton() and actionLink() with the .noWS fix"), # actionLink variations layout_columns( card( card_header("actionLink - Basic"), h4("Without icon"), p("Click ", actionLink("link1", "this link"), " here."), h4("With icon"), p("Click ", actionLink("link2", "this link", icon = icon("star")), " here."), h4("Different icons"), p(actionLink("link3", "Home", icon = icon("house"))), p(actionLink("link4", "Settings", icon = icon("gear"))), p(actionLink("link5", "Download", icon = icon("download"))), p(actionLink("link6", "Upload", icon = icon("upload"))) ), card( card_header("actionLink - Styled"), h4("With classes"), p(actionLink("link7", "Primary", class = "text-primary")), p(actionLink("link8", "Success", class = "text-success")), p(actionLink("link9", "Danger", class = "text-danger")), p(actionLink("link10", "Warning", class = "text-warning")), h4("With icons + styling"), p(actionLink("link11", "Save", icon = icon("save"), class = "text-success")), p(actionLink("link12", "Delete", icon = icon("trash"), class = "text-danger")) ), card( card_header("actionLink - In context"), h4("Multiple inline"), p( actionLink("link13", "First"), " | ", actionLink("link14", "Second"), " | ", actionLink("link15", "Third") ), h4("In span"), span("Text before ", actionLink("link16", "link"), " text after"), h4("Long label"), p(actionLink("link17", "This is a link with a much longer label text", icon = icon("info-circle"))) ) ), # actionButton variations layout_columns( card( card_header("actionButton - Basic"), h4("Without icon"), actionButton("btn1", "Click Me"), actionButton("btn2", "Another Button"), h4("With icon"), actionButton("btn3", "Save", icon = icon("save")), actionButton("btn4", "Delete", icon = icon("trash")), actionButton("btn5", "Upload", icon = icon("upload")) ), card( card_header("actionButton - Styled"), h4("Bootstrap button classes"), actionButton("btn6", "Default"), actionButton("btn7", "Primary", class = "btn-primary"), actionButton("btn8", "Success", class = "btn-success"), actionButton("btn9", "Info", class = "btn-info"), actionButton("btn10", "Warning", class = "btn-warning"), actionButton("btn11", "Danger", class = "btn-danger"), h4("With icons"), actionButton("btn12", "Save", icon = icon("save"), class = "btn-success"), actionButton("btn13", "Delete", icon = icon("trash"), class = "btn-danger") ), card( card_header("actionButton - Sizes & States"), h4("Sizes"), actionButton("btn14", "Large", icon = icon("star"), class = "btn-primary btn-lg"), actionButton("btn15", "Default", icon = icon("star"), class = "btn-primary"), actionButton("btn16", "Small", icon = icon("star"), class = "btn-primary btn-sm"), h4("Icon only"), actionButton("btn17", NULL, icon = icon("heart"), class = "btn-danger"), actionButton("btn18", NULL, icon = icon("star"), class = "btn-warning"), actionButton("btn19", NULL, icon = icon("thumbs-up"), class = "btn-success"), h4("Disabled"), actionButton("btn20", "Can't Click", icon = icon("ban"), disabled = TRUE) ) ), # Mixed usage card( card_header("Mixed Usage - Buttons and Links Together"), p( "You can ", actionLink("mixed1", "click this link", icon = icon("link")), " or ", actionButton("mixed2", "this button", class = "btn-sm btn-primary"), " or ", actionLink("mixed3", "another link"), " in the same paragraph." ), h4("Navigation pattern"), div( style = "display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center;", actionLink("nav1", "Home", icon = icon("house")), span("|"), actionLink("nav2", "Profile", icon = icon("user")), span("|"), actionLink("nav3", "Settings", icon = icon("gear")), span("|"), actionLink("nav4", "Help", icon = icon("circle-question")), span("|"), actionButton("nav5", "Logout", icon = icon("right-from-bracket"), class = "btn-sm btn-outline-danger") ) ), # Edge cases card( card_header("Edge Cases"), h4("Very long labels"), actionButton("edge1", "This is a button with an extremely long label that should wrap properly", icon = icon("info")), br(), br(), p("This is a paragraph with ", actionLink("edge2", "a link that has an extremely long label that might wrap to multiple lines", icon = icon("link")), " embedded in it."), h4("Special characters"), actionLink("edge3", "Link with émojis 🎉", icon = icon("party-horn")), actionButton("edge4", "Button with 中文", icon = icon("language")), h4("Empty and whitespace"), actionButton("edge5", " Spaces ", icon = icon("space-awesome")) ), # Inspection section card( card_header("HTML Inspection"), p("Right-click and 'Inspect' any element above to see the compact HTML."), tags$pre( tags$code( 'Expected HTML structure:\n', '...text\n', '' ) ), p(strong("Note:"), " There should be NO whitespace between tags, but proper spacing should appear visually due to CSS margin.") ), # Click counter card( card_header("Click Tracking"), p("Click any element above to see it tracked here."), verbatimTextOutput("click_output") ) ) server <- function(input, output, session) { clicks <- reactiveVal(list()) # Get all input IDs all_ids <- c( paste0("link", 1:17), paste0("btn", 1:20), paste0("mixed", 1:3), paste0("nav", 1:5), paste0("edge", 1:5) ) # Observe all inputs lapply(all_ids, function(id) { observeEvent(input[[id]], { new_clicks <- clicks() new_clicks[[length(new_clicks) + 1]] <- list( id = id, value = input[[id]], time = Sys.time() ) # Keep only last 10 clicks if (length(new_clicks) > 10) { new_clicks <- new_clicks[(length(new_clicks)-9):length(new_clicks)] } clicks(new_clicks) }) }) output$click_output <- renderText({ if (length(clicks()) == 0) { return("No clicks yet. Click any button or link above.") } lines <- sapply(rev(clicks()), function(click) { sprintf("[%s] %s clicked (count: %d)", format(click$time, "%H:%M:%S"), click$id, click$value) }) paste(lines, collapse = "\n") }) } shinyApp(ui, server) ```
problem_statement.issue_title: actionLink underline extends more than expected
problem_statement.issue_body: ### Problem `actionLink`'s underline in `shiny 1.12.1` extends more than expected when used inside a `shiny::p()` or `shiny::span()`. The problem doesn't happen when `shiny::tags$a()` is used instead. The following screenshot showcases the issue: The screenshot above can be reproduced with the following code: ```R library(shiny) library(bslib) ui <- page_fluid( card( shiny::p( "The underline in ", shiny::actionLink("action_link", "this link"), " extends more than expected." ), shiny::p( "The underline in ", shiny::tags$a( id = "a_tag", href = "#", class = "action-button action-link", "this link" ), " looks as expected." ) ), card( shiny::span( "The underline in ", shiny::actionLink("action_link", "this link"), " extends more than expected." ), shiny::span( "The underline in ", shiny::tags$a( id = "a_tag", href = "#", class = "action-button action-link", "this link" ), " looks as expected." ) ) ) server <- function(input, output, session) { } shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server) ``` As an additional note, the problem didn't exist with `shiny 1.11.1`. ### System details Output of `sessionInfo()`: ``` R version 4.5.1 (2025-06-13 ucrt) Platform: x86_64-w64-mingw32/x64 Running under: Windows 11 x64 (build 26100) Matrix products: default LAPACK version 3.12.1 locale: [1] LC_COLLATE=English_United States.utf8 LC_CTYPE=English_United States.utf8 [3] LC_MONETARY=English_United States.utf8 LC_NUMERIC=C [5] LC_TIME=English_United States.utf8 time zone: America/Buenos_Aires tzcode source: internal attached base packages: [1] stats graphics grDevices utils datasets methods base other attached packages: [1] bslib_0.9.0 shiny_1.12.1 loaded via a namespace (and not attached): [1] vctrs_0.6.5 cli_3.6.5 rlang_1.1.6 otel_0.2.0 [5] promises_1.5.0 jsonlite_2.0.0 xtable_1.8-4 glue_1.8.0 [9] htmltools_0.5.8.1 httpuv_1.6.16 sass_0.4.10 jquerylib_0.1.4 [13] tibble_3.3.0 fastmap_1.2.0 lifecycle_1.0.4 memoise_2.0.1 [17] compiler_4.5.1 fs_1.6.6 Rcpp_1.1.0 pkgconfig_2.0.3 [21] later_1.4.4 digest_0.6.38 R6_2.6.1 pillar_1.11.1 [25] magrittr_2.0.4 tools_4.5.1 mime_0.13 cachem_1.1.0 ```

test_patch: diff --git a/tests/testthat/_snaps/actionButton.md b/tests/testthat/_snaps/actionButton.md index 1d9086180e..d64e3134fc 100644 --- a/tests/testthat/_snaps/actionButton.md +++ b/tests/testthat/_snaps/actionButton.md @@ -3,19 +3,26 @@ Code actionButton("foo", "Click me") Output - + --- Code actionButton("foo", "Click me", icon = icon("star")) Output - + + +# actionLink uses .noWS to prevent underline rendering issues + + Code + actionLink("foo", "Click me") + Output + Click me + +--- + + Code + actionLink("foo", "Click me", icon = icon("star")) + Output + Click me diff --git a/tests/testthat/test-actionButton.R b/tests/testthat/test-actionButton.R index f7b6ff2d78..ce9992bbfa 100644 --- a/tests/testthat/test-actionButton.R +++ b/tests/testthat/test-actionButton.R @@ -94,3 +94,30 @@ test_that("Action button allows icon customization", { expect_equal(as_character(btn2), as_character(btn3)) expect_equal(as_character(btn3), as_character(btn4)) }) + +test_that("actionLink uses .noWS to prevent underline rendering issues", { + # actionLink should generate compact HTML without whitespace between tags + # This prevents the underline from extending beyond the visible text + + # Test without icon + link <- actionLink("test_link", "Click me") + link_html <- as.character(link) + + # Verify no newlines/whitespace between closing > and opening \n\\s+\n\\s+

fail_to_pass: actionLink should not have whitespace between tags (no newlines/whitespace between closing > and opening <span)
actionLink with icon should not have whitespace between icon span and label span
Snapshot test: actionLink('foo', 'Click me') should produce compact HTML without whitespace
Snapshot test: actionLink('foo', 'Click me', icon = icon('star')) should produce compact HTML without whitespace
pass_to_pass: actionButton('foo', 'Click me') should still work correctly
actionButton('foo', 'Click me', icon = icon('star')) should still work correctly
Action button allows icon customization tests should pass

key_changes: Add `.noWS = c('outside', 'inside')` to the icon span in both actionButton() and actionLink()
Add `.noWS = c('outside', 'inside')` to the label span in both actionButton() and actionLink()
Add `.noWS = 'inside'` to the parent tags$button() in actionButton() and tags$a() in actionLink()
Change CSS from `.action-button:not(.action-link) .action-icon + .action-label { padding-left: 0.5ch; }` to `.action-button .action-icon + .action-label { margin-left: 0.5ch; }`
potential_pitfalls: Forgetting to apply .noWS to both the icon and label spans
Using padding instead of margin for spacing - padding causes underline to extend into the gap for links
Only fixing actionLink() but not actionButton() - both need the .noWS fix for consistency
Not updating the CSS selector - the :not(.action-link) should be removed since margin works for both buttons and links

instruction: Fix the bug in `actionLink()` where the link underline extends into surrounding whitespace. When `actionLink()` is used inside `p()` or `span()` elements, the underline renders beyond the visible text due to whitespace in the generated HTML. The fix should: (1) prevent whitespace around the icon and label spans using the `.noWS` parameter, (2) prevent whitespace inside the parent anchor tag, and (3) change the CSS spacing between icon and label from padding to margin so the underline doesn't extend into the gap for links.
context: The `actionLink()` and `actionButton()` functions in R/input-action.R wrap their icon and label content in `<span>` elements with classes 'action-icon' and 'action-label'. The `.noWS` parameter in Shiny's tag functions controls whitespace rendering - 'outside' removes whitespace before/after the tag, 'inside' removes whitespace between the opening/closing tags and their children. The CSS rule for spacing between icon and label currently uses padding-left, which causes underlines to extend into the gap for links.
